translations.english: A homily of our holy father ...

coptic: ⲉ̀ⲣⲉ ⲡⲉϥⲥ̀ⲙⲟⲩ ⲉ̅ⲑ̅ⲩ̅ ϣⲱⲡⲓ ⲛⲉⲙⲁⲛ ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ.

translations.english: may his holy blessings be with us. Amen.

label: After reading the homily, it is concluded with the following prayers:

translations.english: We conclude the homily of our holy father ...

coptic: ⲫⲏⲉ̀ⲧⲁϥⲉⲣⲟⲩⲱⲓⲛⲓ ⲙ̀ⲡⲉⲛⲛⲟⲩⲥ ⲛⲉⲙ ⲛⲓⲃⲁⲗ ⲛ̀ⲧⲉ ⲛⲉⲛϩⲏⲧ: ϧⲉⲛ ⲫ̀ⲣⲁⲛ ⲙ̀Ⲫ̀ⲓⲱⲧ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡ̀ϣⲏⲣⲓ ⲛⲉⲙ Ⲡⲓⲡ̀ⲛⲉⲩⲙⲁ Ⲉⲑⲟⲩⲁⲃ Ⲟⲩⲛⲟⲩϯ ⲛ̀ⲟⲩⲱⲧ ⲁ̀ⲙⲏⲛ.

translations.english: who enlightened our minds and our hearts. In the name of the Father, and the Son, and the Holy Spirit, one God. Amen.
